channel.title: publication on Ziniu Li
channel.description: Recent content in publication on Ziniu Li

item.title: Publication
item.description: My publication profile at Google Scholar. * indicates the equal contribution. [2020] Tian Xu, Ziniu Li, Yang Yu. Error Bounds of Imitating Policies and Environments. In Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 33 (NeurIPS), 2020. [paper] [poster] [code] [blog] Ziniu Li*, Xiong-Hui Chen*. Efficient Exploration by Novelty-pursuit. In Proceedings of the 2nd International Conference on Distributed Artificial Intelligence (DAI), 2020. [paper] [poster] [slides] [video] [blog] Fei-yu Liu, Ziniu Li, Chao Qian.
